remaining_params.SpellDescription: Draw a card, then discard a card.

params.TgtPrompt: Select target creature card in your graveyard
params.SpellDescription: CARDNAME becomes a copy of target creature card in your graveyard with mana value X, except it has flying and this ability. Activate only as a sorcery.
